outbound.title: Outbound
outbound.subtitle: Pick a scheduled delivery sheet, confirm its details, capture the driver, and mark the container outbound. Printing the receipt is what stamps the outbound event.

pick.pending_empty: No delivery sheets are waiting for pickup.

confirm.note: Confirm the AT number and details match the truck at the gate. Delivery sheets aren't editable from here — if something's wrong, fix it on the source invoice.
confirm.resolved_missing: Resolved data is missing on this sheet.

sms.note: Capture the driver's contact and send them the receipt link by SMS. Email is optional and recorded for the next time they show up.
sms.invalid_phone: Enter a valid US phone number.

intake.kind_heading: What kind of box is this?
intake.kind_sales_subtitle: A box we bought and will resell. Has a release number.
intake.kind_storage_subtitle: A customer's box that we're holding on the yard.
intake.release_unavailable: That release isn't available anymore — pick another.
intake.logged_sales: Box logged. Michelle will review it before it goes available.
intake.logged_sh: Box logged. Michelle will review the rates and intake date before billing starts.

photo_step.doors_intro: Take a clear photo of the doors. Make sure the painted unit numbers and the white sticker are right-side up and easy to read. You can skip this if the camera isn't handy.
photo_step.others_intro: Optional. Snap any damage, the inside, or other angles you want on file. You can add as many as you want, or just tap Next to keep going.
photo_step.ocr_failed: We couldn't read the unit number from this photo. Type it by hand on the next step.

confirm_step.heading: Check the unit number
confirm_step.no_image: No image provided. Type the unit number by hand below.
confirm_step.read_success: We read {{unit}} off the photo (looks like a {{size}}). Fix it below if that's not right.
confirm_step.read_success_no_size: We read {{unit}} off the photo. Fix it below if that's not right.
confirm_step.read_failed: We couldn't pick out a unit number from the photo. Type it by hand below.
confirm_step.matched_release: Matched to release {{release}} ({{company}}). We'll fill that in for you on the next step.
confirm_step.matched_release_no_company: Matched to release {{release}}. We'll fill that in for you on the next step.

sales_details.heading: Container details
sales_details.damage_placeholder: As-is / minor dent rear door / etc.

review.heading: Looks good?
review.sales_intro: Hit Submit and we'll log this box. Michelle will review the details and confirm the price before it's available.
review.sh_intro: Hit Submit and we'll log this box. Michelle will review the rates and intake date before billing starts.

sh_yard.title: Storage
sh_yard.empty: No storage boxes on the yard.

help.title: Help
help.lede: If something looks wrong or you're not sure what to do, ask Michelle. She'll get back to you quickly.
